ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of data collection */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value from the sensor */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location at the time of data collection */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location at the time of data collection */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the quality check pertains to */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the quality check */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the provenance record pertains to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "original_source" TEXT /* Original source of the data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or updated the data */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the provenance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
